values: If you fall behind the group by 45 minutes and are visibly struggling, your Trek Leader may send you back.
When you lag behind, you pull your entire team back. Your Trek Leader has to slow everyone down.
The trekkers who trained hard and showed up prepared won't take this lightly. Nobody wants to miss a summit or a breathtaking viewpoint because someone didn't train.

evidence.quote_or_summary: If you fall behind the group by 45 minutes and are visibly struggling, your Trek Leader may send you back. That's a call none of us want to make. But it is essential for your and the entire team's safety.
when you lag behind, you pull your entire team back. Your Trek Leader has to slow everyone down.
Nobody wants to miss a summit or a breathtaking viewpoint because someone didn't train.

values: Walk, jog or run 5 km in under 35 minutes (minimum recommended fitness level)
Build cardiovascular endurance and muscle strength
Train core, calves, glutes, quadriceps, and hamstrings

evidence.quote_or_summary: To do the Beas Kund Trek comfortably, you must be able to walk, jog or run 5 km in under 35 minutes. This is the minimum recommended fitness level that you must aim for.
To reach any fitness target, there are two things you must work on: Cardiovascular Endurance, Muscle Strength
You need to train your core, calves, glutes, quadriceps, and hamstrings.

values: Track runs on Strava, Nike Run Club, or any similar fitness app
Take 3 screenshots of runs and upload to Indiahikes Dashboard
Upload screenshots 15 to 20 days before trek date
Screenshots must demonstrate meeting fitness criteria at least 3 times in the past month

evidence.quote_or_summary: Track your runs on Strava, Nike Run Club, or any similar fitness app.
Take 3 screenshots of your runs and upload them to your Indiahikes Dashboard.
Make sure you upload these screenshots 15 to 20 days before your trek date.
Your runs don't meet your trek's fitness criteria at least 3 times in the past month.

values: 15 to 20 days before trek date for screenshot upload

evidence.quote_or_summary: Follow this, and you'll be trek-ready in 6 weeks.
Make sure you upload these screenshots 15 to 20 days before your trek date.

values: Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records
Parents must ensure children remain physically active and prepared for the trek

evidence.quote_or_summary: Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records. However, parents must ensure that children remain physically active and prepared for the trek.

values: You will struggle and fall behind
Trek Leader may send you back if you fall behind by 45 minutes and are visibly struggling
Fitness records can be rejected if screenshots are not uploaded or runs don't meet criteria at least 3 times in the past month

evidence.quote_or_summary: If you're not fit, you won't enjoy your trek. Simple as that. You'll struggle. You'll fall behind.
If you fall behind the group by 45 minutes and are visibly struggling, your Trek Leader may send you back.

Your fitness records will be rejected for one of two reasons: You haven't uploaded your 3 screenshots to your dashboard. Your runs don't meet your trek's fitness criteria at least 3 times in the past month.
